title: Goat Separator (legacy)
description: A simple mod that alters the texture of screaming goats and shows a yellow name tag over them.
body:
FURTHER DEVELOPMENT MOVED

The features of this mod are now found in the mod Entity Separator. Please use that instead!

Goat Separator

Description

A simple mod that alters the texture of screaming goats and shows a yellow name tag over them.

The name tag is visible within 64 blocks around the player when toggled on.
(default: L-Alt, can be changed in keybinds)

The text will either be rendered as the name of the goat or simply "Screaming Goat".

Installation

  • Install Fabric
  • Download the Fabric-API jar and put it in your .minecraft/mods folder
  • Download the mod jar and put it in your .minecraft/mods folder
  • That's it! :)

Resource Packs

The mod supports custom textures! To change the texture of screaming goats put the new texture at:
./assets/goatseparator/textures/entity/goat/screaming_goat.png

Servers

This mod is clientside. It will work on servers, however it might be considered cheating.
Be sure to ask permission before using it on a server!

Modpacks

You can add this mod to modpacks if you want.
